behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (scripts/setup-installable-branch.ts, .github/workflows/nightly.yml, preview.yml, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md) and behavioral requirements (preview branch, push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch triggers, positional arg, remove Nightly Builds section) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and expected behavior without giving exact code or line-level fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check high-level outcomes (file removed, triggers present, substring 'remix-run/remix#preview'), allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_setup_script_requires_positional_arg executes the script via node subprocess; repo tests run pnpm lint/typecheck/format/changes:validate.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual file deletion, script behavior change, and README/CONTRIBUTING edits; stubs cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each expected behavior bullet (preview branch install docs, workflow triggers, nightly removal, positional arg, no overwrite protection) has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with section comments for Gates, pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass, and anti-regression.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data outputs.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands are consistent and correctly spelled.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files in scope (appropriate given task is about modifying specific workflows/scripts) without citing line numbers or exact code changes.
